title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy links when the internet is turned off
scenario: Onboarding EULA page License Agreement and Privacy Policy links show "Something went wrong" screen when internet is off; Cancel returns to "Well hello, first things first..." screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding 'Well hello, first things first...' screen, tap the 'License Agreement' link.
3. Turn off internet connectivity on the device.
expected: The License Agreement or Privacy Policy page should display the content of the agreement/policy, or a clear offline error message. Tapping Cancel should return to the onboarding 'Well hello, first things first...' screen.
